input: social network graph with user interactions and content diffusion traces
output: predicted popularity (e.g., number of future adoptions) for a given content
backbone: unsupervised graph neural network with attention mechanism
loss: unsupervised (no explicit loss mentioned; likely reconstruction or contrastive)
key_idea: unify social influence and homophily by learning directional influence via attention and nondirectional homophily via GNN, plus social group representations from user clusters
